page_title: Public Union “Association of Volunteer Teams of Ukraine” (AVKU)
hero_header: ASSOCIATION OF VOLUNTEER TEAMS OF UKRAINE
hero_slogan: VOLUNTEERS BY THE CALL OF THE HEART — EITHER YOU FIGHT OR YOU HELP!
hero_text: We unite volunteer initiatives and partners to respond quickly to requests, support the Armed Forces of Ukraine, and help people.
overview_text: A brief description of the mission, goals, and projects...
urgent_need_1_desc: We help cover urgent requests: equipment, communications, power solutions, drones, and other essentials as needed.
urgent_need_2_title: Humanitarian kits and support for resilience points
urgent_need_2_desc: Tea, coffee, water, hygiene items, and other essentials for people in difficult conditions.
activity_zsu: Support for the Armed Forces of Ukraine
activity_zsu_desc: We collect and deliver essential equipment and supplies to the front — based on unit requests.
activity_humanitarian_desc: Regular deliveries of food, medicine, and hygiene supplies for service members and civilians.
activity_manufacturing_desc: Camouflage nets, trench candles, and other essentials — together with volunteers and partners.
activity_veterans_desc: Support for veterans and families, educational and cultural initiatives, charity events, and cooperation with organizations.
news_item_1_title: Delivery of Combat Drones to Our Defenders
news_item_1_text: Today, together with partners and everyone who contributed to the fundraiser, we delivered combat drones to our defenders. Each drone means saved lives and brings us closer to victory.
news_item_2_title: Assistance for the “Bratstvo” Unit of the Defence Intelligence
news_item_2_text: Today we delivered humanitarian aid to the Defence Intelligence’s “Bratstvo” unit. Thanks to your support, we purchased and delivered EcoFlow power stations, Starlink kits to improve communications, and a camouflage net for additional protection. Thank you to everyone who contributed.
about_text_1: The Public Union “Association of Volunteer Teams of Ukraine” is a community that brings together NGOs, volunteer teams, and individual volunteers.
about_text_2: The main goal of AVKU is to unite efforts and cooperation to strengthen the volunteer movement, provide meaningful support to the Armed Forces of Ukraine, and help people affected by the war.
about_text_3: Mutual support among volunteers of all generations is a daily step toward victory and the post-war recovery of Ukraine.
about_text_4: AVKU was founded on many years of active volunteer work by individuals and civic organizations that have been helping Ukraine since the beginning of Russia’s aggression in 2014.
about_text_5: The founding organizations of AVKU in 2022 were:
about_list_3: NGO “Intellect — Club of Civilizational Development of Ukraine”
about_list_4: NGO “Institute for the Formation and Development of Civil Society ‘Digital Viche’”
